metadata.seed: I broke up with a partner and I’m verbally upset and emotionally upset as well

patient.query: I definitely feel upset. It’s like all I can think about is how lonely I am now. I keep replaying everything in my mind—wondering if I’ll ever meet someone again or if I messed things up. It just feels really overwhelming sometimes.
